product: Type widening is now generally available
tagline: Type widening for Delta Lake tables is now generally available.
what_it_does: Type widening for Delta Lake tables is now generally available. Type widening allows you to change column data types to wider types such as INT to BIGINT or FLOAT to DOUBLE during ingestion without rewriting underlying data files. Available on Delta Lake tables in Databricks Runtime 15.4 LTS and above, type widening allows you to change column data types to a wider type without rewriting data files.
why_it_matters: Supported type changes You can widen types according to the following rules: | Source type | Supported wider types | | | | | BYTE | SHORT, INT, BIGINT, DECIMAL, DOUBLE | | SHORT | INT, BIGINT, DECIMAL, DOUBLE | | INT | BIGINT, DECIMAL, DOUBLE | | BIGINT | DECIMAL | | FLOAT | DOUBLE | | DECIMAL | DECIMAL with greater precision and scale | | DATE | TIMESTAMP NTZ | | VOID | Any type | Type changes are supported for top level columns and fields nested inside structs, maps, and arrays.
key_takeaway: Type widening for Delta Lake tables is now generally available.
